slm_inference._comment: How the Stage-2 gate feeds code to the small classifier. Mirrors the training chunking in src/training/dataset_builder.py. The SLM scores uniform code windows (not whole functions); cross-file context is NOT fed to the SLM — it is attached only when a finding escalates to the Stage-3 LLM.

evaluation._comment: Settings for src/evaluation/run_comparative_evaluation.py only. Does not affect the production Stage 1/2/3 pipeline.

training._comment: Settings for src/training/*. After fine-tuning, set custom_classifier_model to the trained model directory and rebuild the Docker image.

chunk._comment: Train the classifier on uniform code windows (function-level label, chunk-level input) so every sample fits CodeBERT's 512-token window. See docs/SLM_CHUNKING.md.
